final_prompt.prompt:
Create a classical oil painting portrait of a contemporary professional woman in the style of Dutch Golden Age masters.

Style/medium: oil on canvas, heavy impasto brushwork, Rembrandt chiaroscuro technique, museum-quality fine art painting
Composition: bust portrait with slight three-quarter angle, focused on face and hands holding a book, tight framing
Subject: East Asian woman around 35 years old, wearing a dark suit, wise and determined expression, holding a heavy book with detailed hands showing knuckles and skin texture
Scene/backdrop: deep brown dark background with almost no detail, all attention drawn to the subject's face
Lighting/mood: classic Rembrandt lighting with triangular highlight on one side of the face, soft shadows on the other side, dramatic chiaroscuro
Color palette: brown, ochre, deep red as base tones, bright warm white only in facial highlight areas
Materials/textures: thick oil paint texture with visible brushstrokes, rich pigment quality, classical gravitas combined with modern feminine independence
Avoid: flat lighting, modern photography aesthetic, plastic skin, digital smoothness, 8K stuffer words
